mail.subject: Payables_Finance_Program_Application_Rejected
mail.body:
Dear ${name},

China Systems, in partnership with CS Bank, has reviewed your Payables Finance Program onboarding application.

Your application has been rejected for the following reason:

${rejectReason}

Please click the following secure link to review and resubmit your application:

${link}

IMPORTANT: This link is time-bound and can only be used once for security purposes.
If the link has expired or you need assistance, please contact your anchor customer.

Best regards,
SCF Integration Team
CS Bank Support
